# Contributing to Wayfinder

First off, thank you for considering contributing to Wayfinder! Helping players navigate the complexities of Pathfinder 1e is a noble quest. To keep the math accurate and the code clean, please follow these guidelines.

## Rules for Contribution

All mechanics implemented in Wayfinder must align with the Pathfinder 1st Edition Core Rulebook or official errata. For any submissions, provide URLs to the relevent discussion or resource.

Examples:

- [Archives of Nethys](https://www.aonprd.com/)
- [d20PFSRD](https://www.d20pfsrd.com/)

## 🛠️ Development Workflow

- Follow the formatting rules in editorconfig
- All behavior must have unit tests (NUnit)

📬 Submitting a Pull Request

- Open a PR: Target the **next-release** branch.
- Your PR will automatically notify @jakob-hendrix for review.
- Use the provided template

## 🛑 What Not to Contribute

- Homebrew: At this stage, Wayfinder is strictly for RAW (Rules as Written) Pathfinder 1e.
- Other Systems: Please do not submit PRs for Pathfinder 2e or Starfinder.

## 💬 Communication

If you're unsure about an implementation, open an Issue first to discuss the design. It's better to chat about the math before writing 500 lines of code!
